title: 5 x Large Aluminium Foil Rosting Trays Deep (32x26x7 cm) – Heavy-Duty Tin Foil Containers for Cooking, Baking, Roasting, BBQ, Freezing & Meal Prep – Disposable & Recyclable Food Storage
features: Half Gastronorm Size – These large aluminium foil trays (32 x 26 x 7 cm, 3500ml capacity) are designed to fit two per food warmer, making them ideal for busy kitchens, buffets, and catering services.

Heavy-Duty & Leak-Resistant – Made from thick, food-safe aluminium, these sturdy and durable foil containers ensure secure handling, prevent leaks, and maintain their shape during cooking and transport.
Oven & Freezer Safe – Withstands high oven temperatures for baking, roasting, grilling, and broiling, while also being freezer-safe for meal prep and food storage.

Multipurpose & Versatile – Ideal for cooking, baking cakes, roasting meats, grilling vegetables, meal prepping, storing leftovers, BBQs, and takeaways, making them perfect for catering, events, and home kitchens.

Eco-Friendly & Recyclable – Our disposable aluminium foil trays are 100% recyclable, providing a sustainable and convenient food storage solution for home cooking, catering services, and takeaway businesses.
description: Our large aluminium foil trays are the perfect solution for busy kitchens, catering businesses, and high-volume food service. Designed to half Gastronorm size (32 x 26 x 7 cm, 3500ml capacity), these trays fit neatly into food warmers, allowing for efficient kitchen operations. Whether you're cooking, baking, roasting, grilling, meal prepping, or storing food, these sturdy and durable foil containers offer unmatched versatility and convenience. Made from premium, food-safe aluminium, these heavy-duty trays are oven-safe, freezer-safe, and recyclable, ensuring even cooking without warping. Their deep design makes them ideal for bulky meals, roasting meats, baking cakes, grilling vegetables, and storing leftovers. Foil lids and hoods (sold separately) provide a secure covering for easy food transport, making them an excellent choice for catering, takeaways, and meal deliveries. Perfect for restaurants, buffets, BBQs, parties, and food service, these leak-resistant and stackable aluminium foil trays ensure safe handling and transport. With their eco-friendly, 100% recyclable design, they also help support sustainable food packaging solutions.
